query:
SELECT 'users' AS tbl, workspaceId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'invitations', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM invitations WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'clients', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'policies', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM policies WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'reports', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'action_items', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM action_items WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_log', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'payment_attempts', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM payment_attempts WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'messageGenerations', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM messageGenerations WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId
UNION ALL SELECT 'triggerHandled', workspaceId, COUNT(*) FROM triggerHandled WHERE workspaceId IN (60002,330001,330002) GROUP BY workspaceId;
